chunks.text: BEARS 2020 Parking & Transportation - EECS at Berkeley BEARS 2020 Parking & Transportation Address International House 2299 Piedmont Avenue Berkeley, CA 94720 On the UC Berkeley campus at the corner of Piedmont Avenue and Bancroft Way, adjacent to the stadium. Transportation and Traffic Detailed information about public transit: 511.org BART (Bay Area Rapid Transit). BART routes and schedules . The Downtown Berkeley BART station is closest to I-House but be aware the 20- 25 minute walk is on an uphill incline. Taxis are available. Rockridge BART station is convenient by bus transfer to the 51A that runs along College Avenue. Campus Shuttle (route and stops to I-House) is located across from Berkeley BART at Center & Shattuck in front of Bank of America. The shuttle stops in front of I-House. Shuttle routes and schedules . Parking Parking on the UC Berkeley campus can be challenging! The closest lot is a 3-minute walk from IHouse: Stadium Parking Structure (also known as the Maxwell Garage) 2175 Gayley Road On the corner of Gayley and Stadium Rim Way. You may be able to pay for parking, ahead of time, at this structure via Parking Panda Campus Parking Options Free Street Parking : Free spaces along and adjacent to Piedmont. 2 hour maximums Monday-Saturday 9am-7pm. Meter Parking : Bancroft Ave. meters accept major credit cards 9am-6pm, Monday-Saturday. Public Lots : Next to the Berkeley Art Museum – Bancroft & Bowditch. Campus Lots : during traditional work hours, hourly parking, paid in advance Maxwell

Free spaces along and adjacent to Piedmont. 2 hour maximums Monday-Saturday 9am-7pm. Meter Parking : Bancroft Ave. meters accept major credit cards 9am-6pm, Monday-Saturday. Public Lots : Next to the Berkeley Art Museum – Bancroft & Bowditch. Campus Lots : during traditional work hours, hourly parking, paid in advance Maxwell Garage , on the corner of Gayley and Stadium Rim Way, a 3 minute walk from I-House or Underhill Lot at the corner of Channing & College, a 5-10 minute walk from I-House. After 5pm Monday-Friday and weekends , hourly public parking is available in all campus parking areas unless otherwise indicated. After-hours campus lots closest to the IHouse: Boalt Law School Lot (behind the building opposite I-House) Kroeber Lot (on Bancroft near College Ave. under tennis courts.) More parking information: UC Berkeley’s General Parking < BEARS 2020 Schedule Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2020 > View Open Faculty Positions
